subcodes.title: Hadrat-i-Haram in Maku?
subcodes.first_line: Say: God doeth as He willeth. There is no Glory except in God, the Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, the Lord of all the worlds. Say: God doeth as He willeth. There is no Light except in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. قل ما شاء الله لا بهآء الا لله رب السموات و رب الارض رب العالمین قل ما شاء الله لا ضیآء الا لله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
